assertions.text: forall numA: int {:trigger 2 * numA} | 0 <= numA <= k && numA <= CountA(s) :: 2 * numA <= k

ensures.text: forall k: int {:trigger CanFormGoodOfLength(s, k)} | result < k <= |s| :: !CanFormGoodOfLength(s, k)
forall k: int {:trigger CanFormGoodOfLength(s, k)} | result < k <= |s| :: !CanFormGoodOfLength(s, k)
